Article Title: 'Yadav Ji ki...' doesn't defame community: Supreme Court
Article Text: NEW DELHI: The Supreme Court Wednesday rejected a plea seeking a ban or a change in the title of the upcoming film, 'Yadav Ji ki Love Story', saying the name does not portray the Yadav community in a poor light.A bench comprising justices B V Nagarathna and Ujjal Bhuyan rejected the petition filed by the chief of the Vishwa Yadav Parishad.Its main grievance was that the name of the film reflected the Yadav community in bad light in society."We fail to understand as to how the title of a film can reflect the community in a bad light. The title...nowhere has any adjective or any word that portrays the Yadav community in bad light," Justice Nagarathna said. The bench called the apprehensions "wholly unfounded" and dismissed the petition.The bench distinguished its earlier order in a similar case related to 'Ghooskhor Pandat' in which it had asked the producer to change the title of that movie."The expression 'ghooskhor'...means corrupt. Therefore a negative meaning was being attached to the community. In the instant case, no such negativity is attached to the Yadav community.Neither of the reasonable restrictions under Article 19(2) (reasonable restrictions to freedom of speech and expression) under the Constitution are attracted. The name in no way portrays the Yadav community in bad light or any negative way. The writ petition is accordingly dismissed," the order said.The petitioner had alleged that the title created an offensive stereotype against the community and raised concerns over the depiction of the female lead. During the hearing, the counsel for the petitioner argued that while they do not oppose inter-community marriages, the film's portrayal of a woman was unacceptable."A lady cannot be publicised this way," the counsel said, adding that the film claims to be based on a true story.However, the bench remained unconvinced, categorising the film as a work of fiction.
Article Summary: Supreme Court rejects a plea seeking a ban or a change in the title of the upcoming film. Chief of the Vishwa Yadav Parishad said the name reflected the Yadav community in bad light. The bench called the apprehensions "wholly unfounded" and dismissed the petition.

Article Title: Security forces recover IEDs, ammo in J&K’s Poonch
Article Text:
Indian Army, J&K Police Reveal How Saifullah Group Was Eliminated In Op Trashi-1 In Kishtwar

JAMMU: A joint team of the Army and J&K Police on Wednesday recovered two Improvised Explosive Devices (IEDs) and assorted ammunition during an anti-terror exercise, codenamed Operation Ghani, in Poonch district, the Army stated.“Based on synergised intelligence inputs from own sources and J&K Police, a joint operation was launched by the troops of White Knight Corps and Special Operations Group of J&K Police in Gani forest area in Poonch,” the Army’s White Knight Corps stated in an X post.The searches led to the discovery of an arms cache concealed beneath a natural cave, the post said. “One big IED weighing 4.5kg, one small IED weighing 800g, two Chinese grenades, one 9mm pistol, two 9mm rounds, and 22 rounds of 7.62mm ammunition were recovered from the site,” an Army spokesperson said.The explosives and ammunition were destroyed in situ by a bomb disposal team.
Article Summary: The searches led to the discovery of an arms cache concealed beneath a natural cave. “One big IED weighing 4.5kg, one small IED weighed 800g, two Chinese grenades, one 9mm pistol, two 9mm rounds, and 22 rounds of 7.62mm ammunition were recovered from the site,” an Army spokesperson said.

Article Title: 'Case of broken relationship': Delhi HC observes breakup may not amount to abetment of suicide
Article Text:
Delhi high court

NEW DELHI: The Delhi high court has observed that merely breaking up with a partner may not amount to instigation for committing suicide under criminal law. The court remarked while granting bail to a man accused of abetting the suicide of his former partner.Justice Manoj Jain passed the order while hearing the bail plea of the accused, whose former partner died by suicide five days after he married another woman. The woman had allegedly hanged herself in October 2025.Granting bail, the court said that for a charge of abetment of suicide under Section 108 of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), there must be clear instigation. It observed that such instigation should be of a nature that leaves the deceased with no option but to take the extreme step.The court said it would be established only during trial whether the woman’s suicide was due to provocation or instigation, or whether it was a result of her being “hyper-sensitive,” or for some other reason.In its order dated February 24, the court observed that there was no dying declaration in the case. It also recorded that the couple had been in a relationship for around eight years and that there had been no complaint from the woman during that period.The court further observed that there was a significant time gap between the date when the two stopped communicating and the date of the suicide, news agency PTI reported.“Apparently, it seems to be a case of a broken relationship and quite possibly, the deceased, having come to know that the applicant has got married to someone else, has chosen to finish herself,” the court said.The order added that while broken relationships and heartbreaks are common, a mere breakup does not automatically amount to instigation for the purpose of prosecuting someone for abetment of suicide.According to the woman’s father, his daughter had been pressured by the accused to convert to his religion for marriage. He alleged that she was under such pressure when she died by suicide by hanging herself with a chunni. The accused was arrested in November 2025.However, the court highlighted that statements from the woman’s friends indicated that she was upset but did not mention any issue related to religious conversion. The court also recorded that the accused had stopped speaking to her from February 2025 onwards.In his defence, the accused submitted that the couple had maintained a cordial relationship for eight years. He claimed that the woman’s parents opposed the relationship because they belonged to different religions and that it was her parents who forced her to end it.The court granted the accused bail on a personal bond and a surety bond of Rs 25,000 each. The matter will now proceed to trial, where the evidence will be examined in detail.
Article Summary: Delhi high court observes that merely breaking up with a partner may not amount to instigation for committing suicide under criminal law. The court remarked while granting bail to a man accused of abetting the suicide of his former partner. The woman had allegedly hanged herself in October 2025.

Article Title: Ajmer Sharif Dargah: The woman who keeps Ramzan time with a cannon
Article Text: In the heart of Ajmer, the constant bustle and buzz of devotees at Ajmer Sharif Dargah is periodically broken by an unusual sound. It may catch visitors by surprise, but regulars at the shrine and people in the city at large know the unmistakable boom of Fauzia Khan’s cannon, which she has been firing off to mark the beginning of important occasions. With Ramzan under way, she’ll be at it again, diligently fulfilling a labour of love that has earned her the moniker, ‘Topchi’.Every year during the Urs of Khawaja Garib Nawaz, every Friday before Jumma prayers, and through Ramzan, 37-year-old Fauzia fires the ceremonial cannon from the Dargah complex. The blast announces Sehri and Iftar timings and signals prayer hours, continuing a tradition that predates modern clocks and loudspeakers. “ Ye ibadat ka kaam hai, zimmedaari bhi hai aur samman bhi (This is an act of worship, a responsibility and also an honour),” Fauzia says.Dressed in a long kurta, her face covered with a dupatta to shield herself from smoke and sparks, Fauzia prepares the cannon with precision. The tradition dates back to the Mughal era. Emperor Akbar is believed to have introduced it to manage prayer timings during large religious events, especially the Urs and Ramzan.Fauzia learned the work early. She was eight when she began assisting her father, Mohammad Hafeez Khan. “Abba trusted me. He taught me the science, the respect, the devotion behind it,” she says.When her father died in 2008, many assumed the responsibility would pass to a male relative. Instead, Fauzia stepped forward. Dargah officials accepted her claim, and Ajmer saw its first woman artillery keeper. “There were people who said this was not a woman’s job,” she recalls. “But I had grown up doing it.”During Ramzan, her day begins around 2am. She cleans the cannon, prepares the gunpowder, and positions herself on the terrace. The first blast signals Sehri and is followed up by a second to mark the end of eating time. At sunset, the cannon fires again for Iftar.The cannon Fauzia uses today weighs about 35kg and is handheld — a safer version of the older, 53kg wheeled cannon used before Independence. Fauzia’s family follows a rotation system. She performs the duty for two consecutive years, followed by a year when it’s handled by her cousin. She receives Rs 1,500 during Ramzan — an amount she says barely covers the cost of gunpowder. Often, she meets the expenses out of her own pocket. To earn a living, she runs a small tea-and-snack stall. “People think I probably get a lot of respect and money. I do get respect, but not money,” she smiles.She has received no formal recognition from govt or religious institutions. Her only wish, she says, is to perform Umrah (visit Mecca) and receive acknowledgement for her service.The strongest opposition she has faced came from within her extended family. Yet, she has never stepped away — not even on the day her father died. “His body was at home,” she says. “But the cannon had to be fired. Duty comes first. I knew he would want that.”She also says that she doesn’t believe in roles, or symbols. “Roles do not belong to men or women. They belong to those who do them with sincerity. I am not doing this for feminism. I am fighting for tradition. And tradition is stronger when it includes everyone.”
Article Summary: Fauzia Khan, 37, is the first woman artillery keeper at Ajmer Sharif Dargah. She fires the ceremonial cannon every year during the Urs of Khawaja Garib Nawaz. The blast announces Sehri and Iftar timings and signals prayer hours.

Article Title: Veteran CPI leader R. Nallakannu passes away at 101 following multi-organ failure in Chennai
Article Text:
Chennai: Supertree Readies To Open, CPI Veteran Nallakannu Passes Away, DMK Target Voters And More





CHENNAI: Veteran Communist Party of India ( CPI ) leader R. Nallakannu passed away on Wednesday following multi-organ failure at Rajiv Gandhi Government General Hospital.The 101-year-old political leader was admitted to the ICU on February 1 following health issues and received intensive care from a multidisciplinary team of doctors.He was on life support and his condition deteriorated on Monday."He was not able to tolerate treatment and his condition deteriorated further on Wednesday," a release from the hospital said. He was declared dead by doctors at 1.55pm.
Article Summary: The 101-year-old political leader was admitted to the ICU on February 1 following health issues and received intensive care from a multidisciplinary team of doctors. He was not able to tolerate treatment and his condition deteriorated further on Wednesday," a release from the hospital said.

Article Title: Pakistan semi-final qualification scenario: What Sri Lanka exit means for their chances
Article Text:
Pakistan's captain Salman Ali Agha, right, with teammate Saim Ayub during a practice session. (PTI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

T20 World Cup: Shaheen Shah Afridi press conference after England vs Pakistan

T20 World Cup Super 8s Group 2 Points Table

P W L NR Points NRR England (Q) 2 2 0 0 4 +1.491 New Zealand 2 1 0 1 3 +3.050 Pakistan 2 0 1 1 1 -0.461 Sri Lanka (E) 2 0 2 0 0 -2.800

NEW DELHI: New Zealand knocked co-hosts Sri Lanka out of the T20 World Cup with a comprehensive 61-run win in Colombo on Wednesday, but the result has also kept Pakistan in contention for a dramatic semi-final qualification. With England already through, the race for the final spot from Super Eights Group 2 will now be decided over the last two matches.Chasing 169, Sri Lanka needed a convincing victory to stay alive but faltered badly, crawling to 107/8 and exiting the tournament with one game still to play. The heavy defeat ended their campaign and confirmed a fifth straight failure to reach the semi-finals since their 2014 title triumph. The win also significantly boosted New Zealand, whose net run rate jumped to a healthy +3.050, putting them in pole position to qualify alongside England.However, Pakistan’s hopes hinge on the outcome of England versus New Zealand in Colombo on Friday. If New Zealand defeat England, they will finish on five points and qualify directly, rendering Pakistan’s final Super Eights clash against Sri Lanka irrelevant.Pakistan’s opportunity opens up only if England beat New Zealand. In that scenario, England will top the group with six points, leaving New Zealand on three and Pakistan with a chance to draw level if they beat Sri Lanka in their final match in Kandy.If Pakistan win and both teams finish on three points, qualification will be decided by net run rate. The current projections underline the scale of the task facing Pakistan.For instance, if England beat New Zealand by 50 runs, Pakistan would need to defeat Sri Lanka by roughly 20 runs to edge ahead on net run rate, assuming a first-innings score of around 170.If Pakistan chase instead, the equation becomes tougher. They would need to complete the chase in approximately 17.5 overs to surpass New Zealand’s net run rate. Any slower victory could still leave them behind the Blackcaps.England’s dominance in the Super Eights has simplified the group standings, but Sri Lanka’s exit has ensured the final semi-finalist will be decided in a tense finish.Pakistan must now deliver not just a win, but a big one — and hope England do them a favour — to keep their World Cup dream alive.
Article Summary: New Zealand knocked co-hosts Sri Lanka out of the T20 World Cup with a comprehensive 61-run win in Colombo on Wednesday. With England already through, the race for the final spot from Super Eights Group 2 will now be decided over the last two matches. If New Zealand defeat England, they will finish on five points and qualify directly. Pakistan’s opportunity opens up only if England beat New Zealand.

Article Title: T20 World Cup 2026 Super 8 Points Table: Sri Lanka crash out, India face must-win pressure
Article Text:
India's head coach Gautam Gambhir and skipper Suryakumar Yadav. (ANI Photo)

Latest Super 8 Group 2 Points Table:

P W L NR Points NRR England (Q) 2 2 0 0 4 +1.491 New Zealand 2 1 0 1 3 + 3.050 Pakistan 2 0 1 1 1 -0.461 Sri Lanka (E) 2 0 2 0 0 -2.800

NEW DELHI: The race for the semi-finals at the ongoing ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 has intensified, with the Super 8 stage entering its final and decisive phase.In Group 2, co-hosts Sri Lanka became the first team to be officially knocked out after suffering a 61-run defeat to New Zealand on Wednesday.New Zealand posted 168/7 after being put in to bat by Sri Lanka captain Dasun Shanaka. In reply, Sri Lanka could manage only 107/8, bringing their campaign to an end. With Sri Lanka eliminated and England qualified, the remaining two teams, Pakistan and New Zealand, in Group 2 stay firmly in the semi-final race.Group 1, meanwhile, is finely poised. West Indies cricket team lead the table with a massive net run rate following their 107-run win over Zimbabwe. South Africa national cricket team sit second after their commanding victory over India national cricket team, a result that significantly damaged India’s NRR.Thursday will be crucial. West Indies face South Africa in Ahmedabad at 3pm IST, while India take on Zimbabwe in Chennai at 7pm IST.India must beat Zimbabwe to keep their hopes alive. They will also be hoping South Africa overcome West Indies, as both those sides possess strong net run rates while India’s remains heavily negative. The margins in these remaining games could ultimately decide who progresses to the semi-finals.The race for the semi-finals is well and truly underway.
Article Summary: The race for the semi-finals at the ongoing ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 has intensified. The Super 8 stage is entering its final and decisive phase. Sri Lanka became the first team to be officially knocked out after suffering a 61-run defeat to New Zealand on Wednesday.

Article Title: India semi-finals qualification scenario: What India must do to stay alive at T20 World Cup
Article Text:
India cricketers during a practice session. (Pic credit: BCCI)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

India's Playing XI: A big headache for Gautam Gambhir, Suryakumar Yadav

Must-win situation with NRR pressure

What India must do now

NEW DELHI: The real T20 World Cup has begun for co-hosts and defending champions India, and suddenly, nothing is in their control anymore. A crushing 76-run defeat to South Africa at Narendra Modi stadium in Ahmedabad has pushed the pre-tournament favourites into a virtual knockout phase, starting with their must-win Super 8 clash against Zimbabwe in Chennai on Thursday.The heavy loss, combined with West Indies’ massive 107-run win over Zimbabwe, has severely dented India’s semi-final hopes. More worrying than the defeat itself is the net run rate (NRR) damage. India’s NRR has plummeted to -3.800, leaving them far behind West Indies (+5.350) and South Africa (+3.800) in Group 1.With only two matches remaining, Suryakumar Yadav’s side not only need to win but win big — and hope other results go their way.India’s path is straightforward on paper but complicated in reality. They must beat both Zimbabwe and West Indies to reach four points. However, even two wins may not guarantee qualification if net run rate becomes the deciding factor in a three-way tie.If South Africa defeat West Indies and Zimbabwe, both South Africa and India will qualify. But if South Africa lose one match, and three teams finish level on four points, NRR will determine the semifinalists — an area where India currently trail badly.This makes India’s margin of victory crucial. A narrow win over Zimbabwe will not be enough; they need emphatic victories to repair the damage.The immediate focus will be on Zimbabwe in Chennai. A dominant win — potentially by 80-100 runs or more — could significantly improve India’s NRR and revive their chances.Their final Super 8 clash against West Indies in Kolkata on March 1 could then become a virtual quarterfinal.However, India’s fate will also depend on the South Africa-West Indies result. While those permutations remain out of their hands, India’s task is clear.For the defending champions, survival now depends not just on winning — but on winning big.
Article Summary: Defending champions India have been knocked out of the T20 World Cup by South Africa. India's net run rate (NRR) has plummeted to -3.800, leaving them far behind West Indies and South Africa in Group 1. Suryakumar Yadav’s side not only need to win but win big — and hope other results go their way.

Article Title: Sitanshu Kotak India Batting Coach drops verdict on Abhishek Sharma's poor form: 'Does not make sense'
Article Text:
Abhishek Sharma during a net session at MA Chidambaram Stadium on February 23, 2026 in Chennai, India. (Photo/Getty Images)

Is this the end of the T20 World Cup for India? Greenstone Lobo predicts results

With India facing a must-win T20 World Cup match against Zimbabwe, batting coach Sitanshu Kotak has expressed support for under-pressure opener Abhishek Sharma and number three Tilak Varma, saying both are close to delivering.India are coming off a 76-run defeat to South Africa in Ahmedabad and need a win against Zimbabwe on Thursday to stay in contention. They will also partly depend on South Africa finishing the Super Eight stage unbeaten. The struggles of Abhishek and Tilak, especially against off-spin, have hurt India’s campaign.Abhishek, the world number one T20I batter, entered the South Africa game after three consecutive ducks in the tournament. He scored 15 off 12 balls but failed to convert the start. The left-hander continued to attack but could not build an innings. Tilak, meanwhile, has scored 107 runs in five innings at an average of around 21, with a strike rate just above 118."We lost one game only, it was a good game for them (South Africa), we did not bat well. Abhishek looked good in the last game; overthinking about one individual does not make sense. It puts too much pressure on them.Our job is to keep him in a good frame of mind. So when he was scoring 80, 70, 90 in 30 balls, 100 in 40, 50 balls, that time nobody was discussing his game. Once he starts hitting the ball again, you will see the same Abhishek again. There is no doubt. Now, in this game, nobody can give a guarantee that he will do it in the next match. But I think he is not far (from a big score)," said Sitanshu.Kotak also defended Tilak’s strike rate, referring to his 25 off 24 balls against Pakistan on a Colombo pitch where the team was targeting 175 or more."Our planning was right. The ball was spinning there. Ishan gave us a fine start, and after such a start, no team wants to lose three or four wickets quickly. It is a matter of two boundaries for Tilak. Sometimes a batsman does not get those balls. So I don't think there is a question of run-a-ball. Neither is he instructed (to go at run a ball). Neither does he think so himself. Sometimes, depending on wickets and depending on the situation, I think there was more about partnerships in that game in Colombo. And I think we achieved that," he concluded.
Article Summary: India are coming off a 76-run defeat to South Africa in Ahmedabad. They need a win against Zimbabwe on Thursday to stay in contention. The struggles of Abhishek and Tilak, especially against off-spin, have hurt India’s campaign.

Article Title: Mel Owens: Mel Owens Divorce : Former NFL Linebacker Pays Off $1M Debt to Ex-Wife
Article Text:
(x)

The Bachelor

Golden Bachelor

Ex-Rams Star Mel Owens Finally Settles $1 Million Divorce Battle with Ex-Wife Fabiana

Daily Mail

In the world of, the "final rose" is usually the most expensive item on the table. But for Season 2’sMel Owens, the most significant check he ever signed didn’t go to a jeweler, it went to his ex-wife. As of February 25, 2026, court documents have confirmed that the retired NFL linebacker has officially paid off nearly $1 million to resolve a nasty, multi-year divorce battle with his former spouse, Fabiana Owens.The settlement marks the end of a legal saga that has loomed over Mel since before he even stepped foot in the Bachelor mansion.While fans watched Mel search for a "second act" in love on ABC, his ex-wife, Fabiana, was publicly vocal about the reality behind the scenes. In a biting comment to thelast year, she warned that Mel’s reality TV debut would be "bad," referring to the five-year legal struggle that followed their 2020 separation.The $1 million payment was the final payment, settling debts related to their December 2024 divorce decree. According to court records, the sum covers a combination of unpaid spousal and child support, attorney fees, and a massive buyout of Fabiana’s share of their $2.75 million Orange County estate. For Mel, who once famously claimed in court to earn only $1,000 a month despite his NFL pension and legal career, writing this check was the only way to avoid a court-ordered sale of his home.The timing of this financial "house-cleaning" is no coincidence. Mel is currently in a committed relationship with his season’s winner, Peg Munson. Although the pair opted for a "commitment ring" rather than a formal engagement during the show’s finale in November 2025, citing a need to be "authentic and not rush," the couple has recently been spotted flaunting major PDA at the Las Vegas airport.By settling the $1 million debt now, Mel is effectively clearing the runway for a drama-free future with Peg. "I met my match," Peg famously said of Mel, and it seems Mel is proving he can be the man she trusts by finally closing the book on his past.As Mel and Peg discuss the possibility of a small beach wedding (and even a televised special), the $1 million settlement serves as the ultimate "reset button." In the high-stakes world of 2026 celebrity gossip, where many are navigating public breakups, Mel Owens is proving that sometimes the best way to move forward is to settle up.For the man who once said age is just a number, he’s learned that a million is a much more important one. With the debt paid and his "Golden" reputation intact, Mel Owens is finally ready to trade the courtroom for the coast.
Article Summary: The settlement marks the end of a legal saga that has loomed over Mel since before he even stepped foot in the Bachelor mansion. According to court records, the sum covers a combination of unpaid spousal and child support, attorney fees, and a massive buyout of Fabiana's share of their $2.75 million Orange County estate.

Article Title: Jessica Pegula’s Parents: Terry and Kim Pegula, Billionaire Owners of Bills & Sabres
Article Text:
Inside the NFL and NHL ownership empire behind the WTA star.Image via: Getty

The billionaire empire behind Jessica Pegula



Jessica Pegula has spent years trying to make sure people talk about her tennis before they talk about her last name. The American star, currently ranked among the top players on the WTA Tour, recently lifted the Dubai Tennis Championships title, adding another WTA 1000 trophy to her growing résumé. It was her 10th career singles title and cemented her status as one of the most consistent players on tour. Calm under pressure and known for her steady baseline game, Pegula has built her reputation through results. But no matter how many matches she wins, curiosity about her family background always follows.Pegula is the daughter of billionaire business magnate Terry Pegula and business executive Kim Pegula: a fact that has made her one of the most financially unique athletes in professional tennis. Terry Pegula made his fortune in the energy industry. He founded East Resources, an oil and natural gas company, and in 2010 sold its assets to Royal Dutch Shell in a deal reportedly worth around $4.7 billion. That transaction transformed him into one of America’s wealthiest businessmen. Over the years, Forbes has put his approximate net worth in the multi-billion-dollar range.After building his wealth in energy, Terry shifted focus toward professional sports ownership.In 2011, he purchased the NHL’s Buffalo Sabres. Three years later, in 2014, he acquired the NFL’s Buffalo Bills for approximately $1.4 billion. Both teams remain under Pegula ownership and have since increased significantly in valuation. The Pegula family also has ownership interests in other sports entities, including the Buffalo Bandits of the National Lacrosse League.Jessica’s mother, Kim Pegula, has played a major role in the family’s business operations. She became one of the few women in the NFL to serve as a team president, taking on leadership responsibilities with the Bills and the Sabres. Kim, who was adopted from South Korea as a child, has been widely respected for her executive role in professional sports in an industry traditionally dominated by men.Despite growing up in immense wealth, Jessica Pegula has often spoken about wanting to carve out her own identity. She chose tennis early and pursued it professionally, working her way through injuries and setbacks before breaking into the top tier of the WTA Tour. Unlike many heirs to billion-dollar fortunes, she travels the same tour grind as every other player including long flights, tight match schedules and constant competition.Today, Pegula stands as both a top American tennis player and the daughter of one of the most powerful ownership families in U.S. sports.
Article Summary: Jessica Pegula is one of the top players on the WTA Tour. She is the daughter of billionaire business magnate Terry Pegula and business executive Kim Pegula. Pegula made his fortune in the energy industry. In 2011, he purchased the NHL’s Buffalo Sabres for approximately $1.4 billion. The Pegula family also has ownership interests in other sports entities.

Article Title: MLB’s Tallest Player Sean Hjelle: Everything You Need to Know
Article Text:
Sean Hjelle (Image Via Getty)

Sean Hjelle’s MLB journey, career numbers and move to Japan’s Orix Buffaloes

If you are wondering who the tallest player in Major League Baseball history is, the answer is simple. It is Sean Hjelle. He stands 6-foot-11. That ties him with former pitcher Jon Rauch for the tallest player ever to appear in an MLB game. Hjelle made his big league debut with the San Francisco Giants on May 6, 2022. From the moment he stepped on the mound, fans noticed his height. At 6-foot-11 and around 247 pounds, he looks different from almost every other pitcher in the league.Hjelle was born on May 7, 1997, in Fridley, Minnesota. Before reaching the majors, he pitched at the University of Kentucky. The Giants selected him in the second round of the 2018 MLB Draft. Over parts of three MLB seasons from 2022 to 2025, he appeared in 93 games, mostly as a reliever. He posted a 7-8 record with a 5.11 ERA and 145 strikeouts in nearly 150 innings. His strongest season came in 2024, when he had a 3.90 ERA over 58 appearances.Sean Hjelle’s path to the majors started in high school in Minnesota, where he played both baseball and basketball. At Kentucky, he became one of the top pitchers in the Southeastern Conference.In 2017, he was named SEC Pitcher of the Year after going 9-2 with a 3.17 ERA. That strong college run boosted his draft stock and helped him earn a reported $1.5 million signing bonus from the Giants.He worked his way through the minor leagues and reached Triple-A before getting the call in 2022. In his MLB debut, he threw a scoreless inning. Giants manager Gabe Kapler once said Hjelle’s size creates a different look for hitters, making it tough to adjust to his release point. Hjelle does not rely on overpowering speed. Instead, he uses a sinker and off-speed pitches to force ground balls.The 2025 season brought challenges. Hjelle posted a 7.80 ERA in 12 MLB games that year. He performed better in Triple-A with a 2.90 ERA. The Giants designated him for assignment on July 30, 2025, and he later became a free agent.On January 11, 2026, Hjelle signed with the Orix Buffaloes in Japan’s Nippon Professional Baseball league. At 28 years old, he chose a new opportunity overseas to continue his career. Off the field, he is married to his wife Caroline and is a father of two.Sean Hjelle’s height may grab attention first, but his journey shows how hard it is to stay at the top level of baseball.
Article Summary: Sean Hjelle made his MLB debut with the San Francisco Giants in 2022. At 6-foot-11 and around 247 pounds, he looks different from almost every other pitcher in the league. Over parts of three MLB seasons from 2022 to 2025, he appeared in 93 games.

Article Title: From Rory McIlroy to Scottie Scheffler: Five richest golfers who raked in millions in 2025
Article Text:
Scottie Scheffler (Image credit: Scottie Scheffler/Instagram)

Here’s a look at the richest golfers of 2025



J.J. Spaun - $13,278,222

Russell Henley - $14,707,570

Rory McIlroy - $16,992,418

Tommy Fleetwood - $18,496,238

Scottie Scheffler - $27,659,550

They say golf is a rich person’s game. At the same time, the sport gives back generously. Golfers and their caddies earn big. Like other sports, golf requires planning, strategy, mental toughness, physical fitness, the ability to stay injury-free, adaptability in different weather conditions, and a bit of luck. Every year, new golfers join the circuit. Some succeed, some sustain their form, some leave the sport, some pursue it as a hobby, and others take it up professionally. Among them are those determined to compete at the top of the leaderboard week after week and earn staggering prize money in the process. When discussing the sport, rankings matter, but so do the numbers that define a golfer’s wealth.According to nationalclubgolfer.com, the American professional golfer had a brilliant 2025 season. J.J. Spaun won the U.S. Open at Oakmont, draining a 64-footer on the 72nd hole to seal the victory. Along with the coveted title, he pocketed a first-place prize of $4,300,000. Spaun suffered a major disappointment when he lost to Rory McIlroy in a playoff at The Players Championship at TPC Sawgrass but bounced back to claim his first major at the U.S. Open.Russell Henley has become a prominent name on the golf circuit due to his consistent performances.He turned professional in 2011 and has competed in over 300 tournaments. Henley claimed his fifth career victory in 2025, lifting the trophy at the Arnold Palmer Invitational at Bay Hill. His biggest win came when he defeated Collin Morikawa by a single stroke.Rory McIlroy is among the richest golfers in the world. Of all his seasons, 2025 stands out as one of his best. McIlroy won both the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am and The Players Championship, then completed the career Grand Slam by winning the Masters in April. He also claimed the Irish Open title and added another feather to his cap by leading Europe to a Ryder Cup victory. He finished the year with his seventh Race to Dubai title, surpassing the legendary Seve Ballesteros.It’s difficult to emerge from the shadow of legends, but Tommy Fleetwood did so in style. With McIlroy dominating much of the season, Fleetwood finally broke through to win a PGA Tour event - the Tour Championship at East Lake.Scottie Scheffler made nearly $30 million last year, topping the earnings chart for 2025. His dominance was evident as he won 50% of the majors he played, including the PGA Championship and The Open. He left legends like McIlroy trailing behind.So what was the reason for Scheffler’s dominance? Consistency. He finished inside the top 25 in all 20 of his appearances, including 17 top-10 finishes, one runner-up result, and six victories.Also read: Massive paydays, bigger smiles: 2026 Genesis Invitational prize list revealed
Article Summary: Scottie Scheffler made nearly $30 million last year, topping the earnings chart for 2025. J.J. Spaun won the U.S. Open at Oakmont, draining a 64-footer on the 72nd hole to seal the victory. Rory McIlroy won both the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro- Am and The Players Championship.

Article Title: John Cena vs Roman Reigns net worth comparison: Current salaries, WWE earnings, and Hollywood income breakdown
Article Text:
John Cena vs Roman Reigns (Image Source: WWE)

John Cena’s Hollywood expansion fuels his massive net worth

Roman Reigns’ WWE dominance drives steady multi-million earnings

John Cena and Roman Reigns are two of the biggest names in modern professional wrestling, but their financial journeys have taken markedly different career paths. Cena is a 16-time world champion, but successfully pivoted to mainstream entertainment and carved out an international brand well beyond the scope of WWE. Reigns, whose stranglehold on WWE’s modern era as its dominant force and long-term “Tribal Chief” has been largely about wrestling, is the company’s marquee attraction.Both superstars pocket multi-million dollar advances, but their earnings streams show a marked difference. Cena’s wealth is derived from Hollywood blockbusters, television shows and endorsements. On the other hand, Reigns’s overall wealth is mostly gathered from WWE contracts, merchandise royalties, and select sponsorships.As of February 2026, the estimated net worth of John Cena is close to around $80 million. A lot of that wealth was accrued during his prime WWE era, when he is said to have grossed $10 million-$12 million per year based on his base salary and pay-per-view bonuses as well as a generous percentage of merchandise for sale.Cena remains on WWE's books, with his income continuing through special appearances and merchandise revenue.But the game changer has been Hollywood. Cena secured starring roles in colossal film franchises such as Fast & Furious and headlined the DC series Peacemaker, both of which earned him multi-million dollar per project paydays. On the acting side, he has hosted television shows, appeared in commercials and signed endorsement deals with worldwide brands. Through these ventures, he has diversified his income sources and made the kind of money you can make far away from the wrestling racket. His cross-industry appeal has made him one of the richest alumni in WWE history.Roman Reigns, a.k.a. Leati Joseph Anoaʻi, in 2026, has an estimated net worth of between $14 million and $20 million. Reigns’ wealth comes primarily from wrestling, unlike Cena. He is one of the highest-billed superstars in WWE, earning just over $5 million a year under his contract alone, before bonuses and merchandise royalties.Reigns has been positioned as WWE’s premier attraction for years, headlining premium live events and dominating merchandise sales charts. His income also includes performance bonuses, appearance fees and a few endorsement partnerships. While he has made cameo appearances in Hollywood projects, he hasn’t pursued acting as aggressively as Cena.The comparison ultimately reveals two successful but divergent financial blueprints. Cena parlayed WWE stardom into regular riches in mainstream entertainment, and Reigns has fully taken advantage of his status as the company’s face. Both are still financial titans, but Cena’s diversified empire has placed him well ahead in overall net worth.
Article Summary: John Cena and Roman Reigns are two of the biggest names in modern professional wrestling. But their financial journeys have taken markedly different career paths. Cena's wealth is derived from Hollywood blockbusters, television shows and endorsements. Reigns’s overall wealth is mostly gathered from WWE contracts, merchandise royalties, and select sponsorships.

Article Title: Brock Lesnar controversy history: Legal battles, Janel Grant case, and public backlash throughout his career
Article Text:
Brock Lesnar (Image Source: Getty)

Brock Lesnar’s legal disputes and past controversies

Public backlash and WWE’s response to Lesnar’s association with the lawsuit

Brock Lesnar, arguably the most divisive figure in professional wrestling and mixed martial arts of the past 20 years, has found himself in the thick of legal entanglements and public fracas. Whether it was a damage-limiting legal battle in connection with his UFC career or fresh scrutiny of his time under WWE’s bright lights, Lesnar’s off-the-mat story has often threatened to eclipse what he achieved as an athlete.Between his 2007 retirement and recent headlines about him stemming from a civil lawsuit filed by former WWE employee Janel Grant, an industry-shaking complaint. While Lesnar is not accused of a crime and hasn’t been named as a defendant in the suit, allegations cited in filings have powerfully shaped public perception and corporate decision-making, and affected Lesnar’s status onscreen.Lesnar’s past controversies date back to his mixed martial arts career. He failed a drug test for a banned substance shortly after UFC 200 in 2016, resulting in him being suspended by the United States Anti-Doping Agency and the Nevada State Athletic Commission. His victory over Mark Hunt was later overturned to a no-contest. Hunt later filed a lawsuit against Lesnar, the UFC and UFC President Dana White, claiming unfair competition and fraud related to the doping issue.The suit was dropped in 2019, ending a protracted legal battle.Years later, the name Lesnar came up in a much more serious context. Janel Grant also filed a civil suit in January 2024 against McMahon, WWE and the former executive John Laurinaitis, alleging sexual assault and trafficking as well as abuse of power. Court filings described a “world-famous athlete,” later revealed in amended documents to be Lesnar. McMahon allegedly tried to get Grant involved in contract talks with Lesnar, the complaint said. It is important to note that Lesnar hasn't been accused of assault or criminal misconduct in the suit, nor is he named a defendant.The fallout from the suit brought swift professional repercussions. WWE removed Lesnar from creative plans, marketing materials and video game content as the case moved forward, according to news reports. His exit has sparked speculation about the company’s internal review processes and its handling of reputational risk management.So when Lesnar returned to WWE programming later, the reactions were decidedly mixed. Live audiences largely responded warmly, which was in keeping with his long-standing popularity as a marquee draw. But his reinstatement sent the message that the seriousness of the allegations in the broader lawsuit was not being taken seriously, critics said. Advocacy organizations and legal commentators wondered if WWE had gone far enough to address cultural issues in the company.
Article Summary: Brock Lesnar has found himself in the thick of legal entanglements and public fracas. Lesnar’s off-the-mat story has often threatened to eclipse what he achieved as an athlete. He failed a drug test for a banned substance shortly after UFC 200 in 2016, resulting in him being suspended.

Article Title: Vince McMahon dating history: Exploring the WWE chairman’s romantic life and long-term marriage
Article Text:
Vince McMahon dating history: Exploring the WWE chairman’s romantic life and long-term marriage (Image Source: Getty)

How Vince McMahon and Linda McMahon’s marriage shaped their empire

Rumors, controversies and Vince McMahon’s later relationships

Vince McMahon, the longtime force behind World Wrestling Entertainment, has spent much of his life with a spotlight on him. Whereas his on-screen personality was boisterous, polemical, and often grandiose, his love life in real life got off to a demure start in adolescence. Over the decades, his marriage to Linda McMahon grew into one of the most lasting partnerships in professional wrestling history, despite reports of long-ongoing strains behind the scenes.The couple’s relationship has been subject to public scrutiny, including admissions of infidelity and a constant stream of speculation that they would separate, despite remaining legally married for more than 50 years. As McMahon’s business empire expanded around the globe, so did curiosity about his personal life, especially in recent years, with new speculation about fresh relationships.Vince McMahon met Linda McMahon in North Carolina when both were teenagers. He was 16, and she was 13 when they met through church activities. Their relationship progressed at a steady pace, and the couple wed on August 26, 1966, when Linda was 17 and Vince was 21.Together, they forged what would grow into a global sports entertainment juggernaut. Linda also played a prominent role in WWE's corporate growth, serving as CEO for years while Vince Turner focused on creative direction and expansion.Their collaboration did not end with their vows to one another; McMahon soon brought into the fold all of his business plans, television contracts and ambitions for national expansion during the wrestling boom of the 1980s and 1990s.The pair had two kids, Shane McMahon and Stephanie McMahon, who would both go on to become important figures in WWE.But in the years that followed, reports emerged suggesting Vince and Linda had been living largely separate lives outside of their legal marriage. Different insiders had long maintained that the relationship had devolved into a permanent estrangement, but neither publicly completed a divorce for years.Over the years, Vince McMahon has been dogged by gossip and allegations involving other women, though many of those accusations have been challenged, denied, or are legally contested.One of the initial public claims came from a former referee, Rita Chatterton, who said McMahon assaulted her sexually in the 1980s. Though McMahon denied the allegation for decades, reports indicate that he and the woman reached a financial settlement in 2022, without admitting wrongdoing. The allegation brought renewed public scrutiny over his past behavior.McMahon admitted to having extramarital relationships in the early 2000s, although he did not reveal any details about particular individuals. In the same period, on-screen storylines involving WWE personalities like Trish Stratus and Sable (real name Rena Marlette Lesnar) stoked tabloid speculation about whether their televised character arcs mirrored real-life romances. But there was no verified evidence that they were romantically involved outside of scripted programming.In 2024, former WWE employee Janel Grant sued for sexual misconduct and coercion. McMahon has denied the allegations, and the case is part of ongoing legal proceedings. The lawsuit also revived media scrutiny of his personal life and family affairs, while fueling speculation about his relationships outside of his long-running marriage to Linda McMahon.Although rumors and allegations have surfaced from time to time, many of the claims have yet to be proven or legally settled, and McMahon has repeatedly denied wrongdoing.
Article Summary: Vince McMahon met Linda McMahon in North Carolina when both were teenagers. The couple wed on August 26, 1966, when Linda was 17 and Vince was 21. The pair had two kids, Shane McMahon and Stephanie McMahon, who would both go on to become important figures in WWE.

Article Title: Brock Lesnar’s children shine in sports as Turk follows sister Mya Lesnar with hockey heroics
Article Text:
Brock Lesnar and Turk Lesnar (Image Source: Getty)

Turk Lesnar’s breakout on the ice turns heads

A family of elite athletes, from track to the rink

Brock Lesnar has been skating, and his athletic legacy keeps on expanding. Following the national title of his daughter, Mya, last year, the focus has moved onto his son, Turk Lesnar, who is rapidly establishing his name in junior hockey. Recently, Turk scored a hat trick with the Calgary Rockies U17 team in the Junior Prospects Hockey League, and the highlight reel says it all. He plays like a freight locomotive, checks like freight, and scores like a freight train, and the fans have often joked that he resembles Brock Lesnar on skates, which is quite scary to those who play against him.The cherry on top? Turk also attributed his teammate, known as Beersy, with assisting him on the hat trick, saying he set it up in such a way that it was like a movie. The league uploaded the clips on the Internet, and they have been viral indeed. The combination of physical attributes and grace is an indication that Turk is more than a household name; he is a player to be monitored.Turk is a descendant of an already impressive family background. In 2025, Mya Lesnar won the NCAA outdoor shot put championship, cementing her position as one of the best collegiate throwers in the nation.It is apparent that athletic greatness is in the blood of Lesnar.In Minnesota and Saskatchewan, Brock established a legendary career of his own, encompassing pro wrestling, NFL aspirations, and a UFC heavyweight title reign. Life in Canada also suggests the reasons why hockey turned into a family affair. Brock has another son, Sable, who is rising the ladder of hockey with his wife. The Western Hockey League Medicine Hat Tigers drafted Duke last year.On his part, Brock is scheduled to be present at WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas in April as well, with no opponent announced as yet. The Lesnar name still towers so big in the sports world, whether it is in the ring or on the rink. Fans are still looking forward to seeing more of Turk's hockey brilliance, along with Mya's greatness.
Article Summary: Turk Lesnar scored a hat trick with the Calgary Rockies U17 team in the Junior Prospects Hockey League. Brock Lesnar has another son, Sable, who is rising the ladder of hockey with his wife. Brock is scheduled to be present at WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas in April as well, with no opponent announced.

Article Title: NFL Combine 2026: Ohio State LB Arvell Reese eyes top five draft spot after breakout season
Article Text:
Image via IMAGN

Arvell Reese drawing interest from top draft teams

Combine performance could cement Arvell Reese’s status

The 2026 NFL Scouting Combine has attracted a lot of attention to some of the best prospects, and Ohio State linebacker Arvell Reese is one of the most talked-about names this week. Reese had a great collegiate season in 2025 and is now one of the best defensive players in the upcoming NFL Draft, and is widely projected to be selected within the first five picks.The 6-foot-4, 243-pound defender arrived at the combine following a rapid rise at Ohio State. His performances earned unanimous All-American honours and the Big Ten’s Butkus-Fitzgerald Linebacker of the Year award, putting him firmly on NFL teams’ radar.Reese finished his final college season with 69 tackles, 6.5 sacks and 10 tackles for loss, showcasing the versatility that has made him such an intriguing prospect. His ability to play both off-ball linebacker and edge rusher has become a major talking point for scouts evaluating his long-term role in the league.Multiple teams selecting near the top of the draft have already shown interest in Reese. Reports indicate that he met with the New York Jets and the Arizona Cardinals during combine week, two franchises that could target defensive reinforcements early in the draft.Mock drafts have consistently linked Reese with top-three selections, with some analysts projecting him as the first non-quarterback off the board. His versatility has been compared to hybrid defenders who can rush the passer while also contributing in coverage, giving defensive coordinators flexibility in how they deploy him.Reese himself has made it clear he is comfortable playing multiple roles. Speaking at the combine, he noted that teams have asked where he sees himself, and he believes he can adapt to outside linebacker or edge responsibilities at the next level. That positional flexibility could significantly boost his draft value.The combine is a very important step for Reese to prove that he is an exceptional prospect. He is anticipated to take part in both linebacker and edge drills, which will give scouts a better idea of how fast, explosive, and good he is at rushing the passer.Despite his rapid rise, Reese has acknowledged there is room for improvement, especially in coverage and refining his pass-rush technique. Still, his combination of production, athleticism and versatility makes him one of the most exciting defensive prospects in the 2026 class.With draft season approaching, Reese’s performance in Indianapolis could solidify his place as a top-five pick and potentially one of the first defensive players selected in April.
Article Summary: The 2026 NFL Scouting Combine is underway in Indianapolis. Ohio State linebacker Arvell Reese is one of the most talked-about names. The 6-foot-4, 243-pound defender arrived at the combine following a rapid rise at Ohio State. His performances earned unanimous All-American honours.

Article Title: Lebron James Retirement: Is LeBron James retiring? A stunning twist could shape the Los Angeles Lakers legend’s final chapter
Article Text:
Los Angeles Lakers legend LeBron James (Image via: Getty Images)

A shocking offseason twist could see LeBron James walk away and embrace a bold new NBA role

LeBron James’ next move could shift from being a player to being in the management

Despite having their star trio of Austin Reaves, LeBron James, and Luka Doncic at their disposal, the Los Angeles Lakers have dropped four of their last six games. Additionally, it appears more likely that James won't play for Los Angeles in the upcoming season as the Lakers lose more games.There isn't a real "source" that can confirm whether James is truly retiring, despite the fact that he has considered it over the past few years. The star of the Lakers hasn't decided yet. He can also change his mind several times before providing a definitive response.It's unclear what the 41-year-old icon James's future holds at this stage of his career, but it appears like anything is possible. Rumors are now starting to circulate that James would announce his sudden retirement this offseason and take on the role of the NBA's Las Vegas expansion team.Despite the widespread belief that LeBron James will play in the NBA for one more season, a recent article provides a compelling argument for why he might be just a few months away from retirement. James' basketball career is nearing its end at 41 years old, even if he is still playing at a high level.The NBA insider wrote:“James has gotten the unique privilege of playing with his son, Bronny James. His second son, Bryce James, is redshirting at Arizona, and as his father noted earlier in the year, is on his own timeline… The buzz has James going one more year, to get his flowers on the way out.Still, not everyone needs a farewell tour, and he may choose to retire after the 2025-26 campaign.”Eric Pincus of Bleacher Report examined the most recent developments regarding LeBron James' future on Wednesday and said that his return for the 2026–2027 campaign is by no means certain.Pincus wrote:“There’s a rumor going around the league that [James] will be the face of the NBA’s expansion team in Las Vegas… One line of thinking is that he might retire, and his agent, Rich Paul of Klutch Sports, might sell the rest of his agency to UTA (United Talent Agency). With financial backing, they then might look to step into ownership roles…”The 22-time All-Star has dabbled in retirement in recent years, but when the chips were down, he never came close to leaving the sport he has dominated for the majority of the last 25 years. There has been a lot of conjecture over the past few months that James' time with the Los Angeles Lakers will likely expire at the end of this season. The general consensus in the league, however, is that he will make a final tour for one more season. Or perhaps not.James has continued to be a very productive member of the Lakers despite being 41 years old. Consequently, as this season has progressed, James has been associated with other teams. While some speculate that he would rejoin the Cleveland Cavaliers, others say he might play alongside Stephen Curry on the Golden State Warriors, where both players hope to win one last championship before ending their careers.However, recently, James has set a goal for his post-basketball life that would keep him near the NBA, but not as a player. And this involves owning a team. His longtime friend and agent, Rich Paul, may soon take a significant step that would bring them one step closer to owning an NBA team, so that prospect may be imminent.
Article Summary: LeBron James is expected to play for the Los Angeles Lakers this season. The 41-year-old has been linked to other teams, including the Cleveland Cavaliers and the Golden State Warriors. James has set a goal for his post-basketball life that would keep him near the NBA, but not as a player.
